overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk cityscape, likely from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves along graffiti-covered walls, crosses wide intersections with futuristic architecture, and navigates through heavy rain with vehicles and pedestrians visible. The environment features neon signs, towering skyscrapers, and palm trees lining the streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with extensive graffiti art

events.description: white sedan drives past on the right side of the street
slight camera turn to navigate around sidewalk obstacles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered industrial wall

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the rain on the multi-lane road

horizontal traffic signal gantry extending over the street
tall palm trees lining the opposite side of the street
large digital advertising screen visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk. A tall wall covered in vibrant graffiti runs along the left side while the right side opens to a multi-lane street with moderate traffic. Palm trees and futuristic skyscrapers are visible through the heavy rain in the distance, establishing the cyberpunk city setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial loading dock with restricted access

events.description: passing under building overhang into industrial garage area with keep out signage

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the building overhang past a restricted garage entrance

entered.detail: large concrete garage opening with red metal doors and yellow-black striped barriers
red and white warning sign reading KEEP OUT with biohazard symbol
raw concrete wall surface with utility pipes and warning stickers

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an industrial area under a building overhang that provides shelter from the rain. The camera passes a restricted garage entrance marked with warning signs and yellow-black barriers. The environment shifts from artistic graffiti to raw concrete and industrial infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with digital advertising towers

events.description: exiting the covered sidewalk and entering the wide open intersection
crossing the multi-lane road while vehicles pass through the intersection
turning right to navigate around the center of the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide rain-soaked intersection while navigating around moving traffic

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving through the wet intersection

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying anime-style character advertisement
massive cylindrical futuristic skyscraper dominating the skyline
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into a vast open intersection exposed to the heavy rain. A massive cylindrical tower rises in the center distance, surrounded by palm trees and large digital billboards. The camera crosses the wet asphalt, navigating around moving vehicles while the urban landscape opens up dramatically.

events.description: approaching the SECCHO corporate building with illuminated signage
crossing the pedestrian crosswalk near the SECCHO building entrance

agents.ego_description: crossing the street near the SECCHO building while sharing the crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in plaid shirt and shorts walking across the crosswalk toward the camera
white van stopped at the traffic light near the crosswalk

entered.detail: large dark corporate building with illuminated SECCHO signage and multiple windows
broad yellow-striped crosswalk leading to the corporate building entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a large corporate building with prominent SECCHO branding. The camera crosses a marked pedestrian crosswalk where other pedestrians are visible, including a man in a plaid shirt. The environment shifts to a more commercial district with structured architecture, street traffic lights, and moderate pedestrian activity continuing through the heavy rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city, moving from a graffiti-lined sidewalk into an industrial zone and finally toward a corporate commercial district. It begins by walking along a vibrant, art-covered wall beside a busy multi-lane street where palm trees and skyscrapers loom through the heavy rain. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts into a sheltered industrial area under a building overhang, passing raw concrete walls and a restricted garage entrance marked with yellow-black barriers. The camera then emerges from the cover into a vast, open intersection, crossing wet asphalt toward a massive cylindrical tower and glowing digital billboards. Finally, the movement leads across a pedestrian crosswalk toward a large corporate building with prominent SECCHO branding, blending into the structured architecture and traffic of a commercial hub.
